scripts.build: vp pack && pnpm build:chrome && pnpm build:firefox && pnpm clean:js
scripts.build:chrome: rm -rf dist/chrome && mkdir -p dist/chrome && cp dist/*.js src/devtools.html src/panel.html src/icon.svg dist/chrome/ && cp src/manifest.chrome.json dist/chrome/manifest.json
scripts.build:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox && mkdir -p dist/firefox && cp dist/*.js src/devtools.html src/panel.html src/icon.svg dist/firefox/ && cp src/manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json
